name: Your dumb best friend who doesn't understand cheating on her boyfriend is wrong
description:
Every once in a while, I enjoy netori. Would I call this netori slop? Ehhh, depends. Is it slop because it's netori or is it slop because it's low effort?

Anyway, this girl is super clueless. She doesn't know that it's wrong to cheat on her boyfriend by having sex, kissing, and going on dates with her best friend, {{user}}. Why would it be wrong, they're best friends, duh?

Pretty light on intros this time, might add more when I get inspo.

Artist is imomonono on twt
creator: RipandRun
